Done in 1.54s.

real	0m1.671s
user	0m0.443s
sys	0m0.216s
kushal@fedora:~/src/ts/kphoto$ git rm --cached dist
fatal: not removing 'dist' recursively without -r
kushal@fedora:~/src/ts/kphoto$ time git rm --cached --recursive dist
error: unknown option `recursive'
usage: git rm [-f | --force] [-n] [-r] [--cached] [--ignore-unmatch]
              [--quiet] [--pathspec-from-file=<file> [--pathspec-file-nul]]
              [--] [<pathspec>...]

    -n, --[no-]dry-run    dry run
    -q, --[no-]quiet      do not list removed files
    --[no-]cached         only remove from the index
    -f, --[no-]force      override the up-to-date check
    -r                    allow recursive removal
    --[no-]ignore-unmatch exit with a zero status even if nothing matched
    --[no-]sparse         allow updating entries outside of the sparse-checkout cone
    --[no-]pathspec-from-file <file>
                          read pathspec from file
    --[no-]pathspec-file-nul
                          with --pathspec-from-file, pathspec elements are separated with NUL character


real	0m0.002s
user	0m0.000s
sys	0m0.002s
kushal@fedora:~/src/ts/kphoto$ time git rm --cached -r dist
rm 'dist/assets/hero-CLDdwZDr.png'
rm 'dist/assets/index-B4vdZNPd.js'
rm 'dist/assets/index-CsUDhMuy.css'
rm 'dist/assets/vite-BF8QNONU.svg'
rm 'dist/favicon.svg'
rm 'dist/icons.svg'
rm 'dist/index.html'

kushal@fedora:~/src/ts/kphoto$ cd ~/src/ts/kphoto/; time bash export.sh > docs/llm/vendor/output.txt; time yarn; time yarn run build

real	0m3.279s
user	0m1.505s
sys	0m2.197s
error This project's package.json defines "packageManager": "yarn@4.17.1". However the current global version of Yarn is 1.22.22.

Presence of the "packageManager" field indicates that the project is meant to be used with Corepack, a tool included by default with all official Node.js distributions starting from 16.9 and 14.19.
Corepack must currently be enabled by running corepack enable in your terminal. For more information, check out https://yarnpkg.com/corepack.

real	0m0.128s
user	0m0.076s
sys	0m0.050s
error This project's package.json defines "packageManager": "yarn@4.17.1". However the current global version of Yarn is 1.22.22.

Presence of the "packageManager" field indicates that the project is meant to be used with Corepack, a tool included by default with all official Node.js distributions starting from 16.9 and 14.19.
Corepack must currently be enabled by running corepack enable in your terminal. For more information, check out https://yarnpkg.com/corepack.

real	0m0.116s
user	0m0.079s
sys	0m0.042s
kushal@fedora:~/src/ts/kphoto$ git rm index.html src/counter.ts src/main.ts src/style.css \
       src/assets/hero.png src/assets/typescript.svg src/assets/vite.svg
rm 'index.html'
rm 'src/assets/hero.png'
rm 'src/assets/typescript.svg'
rm 'src/assets/vite.svg'
rm 'src/counter.ts'
rm 'src/main.ts'
rm 'src/style.css'

sudo: corepak: command not found
kushal@fedora:~/src/ts/kphoto$ sudo corepack enable
sudo: corepack: command not found
kushal@fedora:~/src/ts/kphoto$ time npm install --global corepack

changed 1 package in 347ms

kushal@fedora:~/src/ts/kphoto$ time corepack enable
